LanguageData.JDG_JusticiarsDispleased: The Dark God disapproves of {0}, and all justiciars suffer as a result. Each has lost {1} favor and are displeased.
LanguageData.JDG_VoidProvocationFavor: The Dark God approves of provoking the pretender. All faithful have been awarded {0} favor.
LanguageData.JDG_LosingFavorDueToPainlessness: {0} is losing favor over time due to not having suffered any pain in the last quadrum.
